basic_details.job_title: Civil Surgeon Office East Singhbhum General Duty Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Civil Surgeon Office East Singhbhum has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 5 General Duty Doctor Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the Civil Surgeon Office East Singhbhum office with original documents and self-attested copies.

qualification.details: General Duty Doctor: MBBS from recognized medical college registered with NMC/JMC

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the General Duty Doctor post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the General Duty Doctor post is scheduled for 10th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the General Duty Doctor position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the General Duty Doctor post is an MBBS degree from a recognized medical college, and the candidate must be registered with the NMC/JMC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the General Duty Doctor recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the General Duty Doctor position is 65 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the General Duty Doctor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the General Duty Doctor post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 63,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the General Duty Doctor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies available for the General Duty Doctor position in the Civil Surgeon Office East Singhbhum.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the General Duty Doctor role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the General Duty Doctor role will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Civil Surgeon Office East Singhbhum office in Jamshedpur, Jharkhand.
